# Repo-level protected paths for coding-agent hooks.
# One pattern per line. Substring match is sufficient.

# Shared agent context and hook configuration
AGENTS.md
.github/hooks/
.codex/hooks.json

# Canonical reusable workflow assets
resources/skills/
resources/instructions/github-instructions-template.md
resources/openspec/

# Sensitive local config examples
.env
.env.production
.env.staging
